title: Nouuur_ pack Black
description: A simple black version of the original Nouuur_ pack made for players who prefer a clean and dark PvP style. This recolor keeps the smooth look and lightweight feel of the original pack while replacing bright colors with darker black and gray tones. Designe
body:
A clean and stylish black-themed Minecraft texture pack created for @nqouir by Luiswozangane. Inspired by the original Nouuur_ style, this pack features smooth dark textures, minimalist colors, and a modern PvP aesthetic designed to make gameplay feel cleaner and more immersive. Perfect for players who enjoy simple yet polished visuals, especially when using the Beast Kit.

Gameplay Preview: https://medal.tv/de/games/minecraft/clips/mHw6XNkuPwntbQyrY?invite=cr-MSxlb0QsNDA5MjYzOTU4&v=30
